name.ja: <ruby>絶<rt>ぜつ</rt></ruby><ruby>望<rt>ぼう</rt></ruby>と<ruby>切<rt>せつ</rt></ruby><ruby>望<rt>ぼう</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: During a turn you have not activated "Despair and Desire", send the top 2 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Special Summon 1 Level 3 or 8 DARK Attribute Fiend Type monster with 1200 DEF from your hand face-up to your field. Then, if you have "Dead Core the Mad Fiend of Despair" on your field, you can add 1 DARK Attribute Fiend Type monster from your Graveyard to your hand.
